data.summary: The exploratory step cannot be validated due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the behavior of rate limiting on authentication endpoints, but there is no concrete evidence provided that demonstrates the implementation or testing of this feature. The linked use cases and prior steps do not include any specific API interactions or results related to rate limiting, leading to an inconclusive status. Without direct evidence of how rate limiting is applied or tested, the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or entities related to rate limiting on auth endpoints.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the rate limiting behavior.
